mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointment (order_id, user_id, main_product_id, main_sku_id, start_time, end_time, total_duration, pet_info, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{mainProductId}, #{mainSkuId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{totalDuration}, #{petInfo}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS id, a.order_id AS orderId, a.start_time AS startTime, a.end_time AS endTime, a.total_duration AS totalDuration, a.pet_info AS petInfo, a.status AS status FROM appointment a WHERE a.order_id IN
#{oid}

SELECT a.id AS id, a.order_id AS orderId, a.start_time AS startTime, a.end_time AS endTime, a.total_duration AS totalDuration, a.pet_info AS petInfo, a.status AS status FROM appointment a WHERE a.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE appointment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
